```{r}
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00452800.1" = "Cel.18",


"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00453760.1" = "Cel.19",



  # =========================
# Lichenase
# =========================
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00053050.1" = "Glb1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00679910.1" = "Glb2",

# =========================
# Beta-glucosidase
# =========================
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00266610.1" = "Bglc.1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00266590.1" = "Bglc.2",

"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00279420.1" = "Bglc.3",

# =========================
# Arabinofuranosidase
# =========================
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00101670.1" = "Asd.1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00325990.1" = "Asd.2",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00326450.1" = "Asd.3",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00346830.1" = "Asd.4",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00420480.1" = "Asd.5",

# =========================
# Mannanase
# =========================
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00612160.1" = "Man.1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00479880.1" = "Man.2",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00263090.1" = "Man.3",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00771660.1" = "Man.4",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00253120.1" = "Man.5",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00561220.1" = "Man.6",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00561230.1" = "Man.7",

# =========================
# Alpha-galactosidase
# =========================
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00041240.1" = "Agal.1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00772750.1" = "Agal.2",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00041210.1" = "Agal.3",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00772740.1" = "Agal.4",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00102930.1" = "Agal.5",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00537080.1" = "Agal.6",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00556460.1" = "Agal.7",

# =========================
# Polygalacturonase
# =========================
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00475020.1" = "Pg.1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00475050.1" = "Pg.2",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00599930.1" = "Pg.3",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00360780.1" = "Pg.4",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00502310.1" = "Pg.5",

# =========================
# Pectin esterase
# =========================
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00598930.1" = "Pme.1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00563120.1" = "Pme.2",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00366450.1" = "Pme.3",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00188100.1" = "Pme.4",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00639410.1" = "Pme.5",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00058460.1" = "Pme.6",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00100460.1" = "Pme.7",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00232130.1" = "Pme.8",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00157350.1" = "Pme.9",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00349290.1" = "Pme.10",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00593290.1" = "Pme.11",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00045130.1" = "Pme.12",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00230000.1" = "Pme.13",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00085260.1" = "Pme.14",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00054490.1" = "Pme.15",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00473670.1" = "Pme.16",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00437860.1" = "Pme.17",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00268440.1" = "Pme.18",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00103570.1" = "Pme.19",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00391190.1" = "Pme.20",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00564170.1" = "Pme.21",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00154320.1" = "Pme.22",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00280980.1" = "Pme.23",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00069330.1" = "Pme.24",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00102050.1" = "Pme.25",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00328630.1" = "Pme.26",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00328640.1" = "Pme.27",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00107880.1" = "Pme.28",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00107890.1" = "Pme.29",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00105250.1" = "Pme.30",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00105260.1" = "Pme.31",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00300590.1" = "Pme.32",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00171960.1" = "Pme.33",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00115940.1" = "Pme.34",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00403060.1" = "Pme.35",

# =========================
# Papain-like cysteine endopeptidase
# =========================
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00420360.1" = "Pap4",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00004010.1" = "Pap5",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00278240.1" = "Pap14",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00311230.1" = "Pap20",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00192770.1" = "Pap24",
# XCPs
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00551890.1" = "Pap.1",

# CEPs

"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00459870.1" = "Pap.2",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00077400.1" = "Pap.3",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00187860.1" = "Pap.4",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00386780.1" = "Pap.5",

# RDs
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00144580.1" = "Pap.6",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00120520.1" = "Pap.7",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00186610.1" = "Pap.8",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00193350.1" = "Pap.9",

# XBCPs
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00069020.1" = "Pap.10",

# F23E12 / F28N24 cluster
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00495640.1" = "Pap.11",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00495650.1" = "Pap.12",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00495660.1" = "Pap.13",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00495670.1" = "Pap.14",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00495680.1" = "Pap.15",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00495690.1" = "Pap.16",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00495700.1" = "Pap.17",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00495710.1" = "Pap.18",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00679480.1" = "Pap.19",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00004790.1" = "Pap.20",

# =========================
# Serine endopeptidase
# =========================
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00044350.1" = "Prs.1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00396740.1" = "Prs.2",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00440510.1" = "Prs.3",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00555990.1" = "Prs.4",

# =========================
# Aspartic endopeptidase
# =========================

# APA family
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00081950.1" = "Apa.1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00291880.1" = "Apa.2",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00567790.1" = "Apa.3",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00652070.1" = "Apa.4",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00016940.1" = "Apa.5",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00249950.1" = "Apa.6",

# F17M5 cluster
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00318350.1" = "Apa.7",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00415360.1" = "Apa.8",

# =========================
# Aminopeptidase
# =========================
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00305500.1" = "Apm.1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00432120.1" = "Apm.2",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00524520.1" = "Apm.3",

# =========================
# Tripeptidyl peptidase
# =========================
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00545030.1" = "Tpp",

# =========================
# Dipeptidyl peptidase
# =========================
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00406500.1" = "Mop.1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00483050.1" = "Mop.2",
# =========================
# Carboxypeptidase (SCPL family etc.)
# =========================

# Non-SCPL
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00285590.1" = "Cbp1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00597910.1" = "Cbp2",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00469870.1" = "Cbp.1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00265950.1" = "Cbp.2",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00587970.1" = "Cbp.3",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00591350.1" = "Cbp.4",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00063380.1" = "Cbp.5",

# F27D4 cluster
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00008170.1" = "Cbp.6",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00673840.1" = "Cbp.7",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00653610.1" = "Cbp.8",

# F10A2 cluster
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00262480.1" = "Cbp.9",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00262490.1" = "Cbp.10",

# SCPL family numerically ordered
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00311110.1" = "Cbp.11",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00593540.1" = "Cbp.12",

"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00722350.1" = "Cbp.13",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00315620.1" = "Cbp.14",

"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00171920.1" = "Cbp.15",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00215140.1" = "Cbp.16",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00171840.1" = "Cbp.17",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00445740.1" = "Cbp.18",

"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00144730.1" = "Cbp.19",

"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00565120.1" = "Cbp.20",

"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00018290.1" = "Cbp.21",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00222540.1" = "Cbp.22",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00364910.1" = "Cbp.23",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00442890.1" = "Cbp.24",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00277430.1" = "Cbp.25",

"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00442850.1" = "Cbp.26",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00442860.1" = "Cbp.27",

"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00230350.1" = "Cbp.28",

"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00048630.1" = "Cbp.29",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00230360.1" = "Cbp.30",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00540890.1" = "Cbp.31",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00656000.1" = "Cbp.32",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00673290.1" = "Cbp.33",

"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00166340.1" = "Cbp.34",

"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00107460.1" = "Cbp.35",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00304700.1" = "Cbp.36",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00442780.1" = "Cbp.37",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00442910.1" = "Cbp.38",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00442940.1" = "Cbp.39",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00442970.1" = "Cbp.40",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00107490.1" = "Cbp.41",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00324700.1" = "Cbp.42",

"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00316830.1" = "Cbp.43",

"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00148330.1" = "Cbp.44",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00522350.1" = "Cbp.45",

"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00494930.1" = "Cbp.46",

"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00183040.1" = "Cbp.47",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00557070.1" = "Cbp.48",

"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00084240.1" = "Cbp.49",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00095780.1" = "Cbp.50",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00084350.1" = "Cbp.51",

"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00041660.1" = "Cbp.52",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00070610.1" = "Cbp.53",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00760680.1" = "Cbp.54",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00499600.1" = "Cbp.55",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00625610.1" = "Cbp.56",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00668820.1" = "Cbp.57",


# =========================
# Lipoxygenase
# =========================

# Lox1
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00307600.1" = "Lox1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00307640.1" = "Lox.1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00188780.1" = "Lox.2",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00481340.1" = "Lox.3",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00188750.1" = "Lox.4",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00462410.1" = "Lox.5",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00462420.1" = "Lox.6",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00462430.1" = "Lox.7",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00462440.1" = "Lox.8",

# Lox2
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00383870.1" = "Lox.9",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00519710.1" = "Lox.10",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00490920.1" = "Lox.11",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00579310.1" = "Lox.12",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00616920.1" = "Lox.13",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00760420.1" = "Lox.14",

# Lox3
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00156010.1" = "Lox.15",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00369210.1" = "Lox.16",

# Lox4
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00369200.1" = "Lox.17",

# Lox5
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00462390.1" = "Lox.18",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00050580.1" = "Lox.19",

# =========================
# Allene oxide synthase
# =========================
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00359600.1" = "Aos.1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00359650.1" = "Aos.2",

# =========================
# Acid phosphatase
# =========================

# Pap (unspecified)
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00124710.1" = "Paph.1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00793860.1" = "Paph.2",

# Pap1
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00084950.1" = "Paph.3",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00797590.1" = "Paph.4",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00629580.1" = "Paph.5",

# Pap2–3
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00142220.1" = "Paph.6",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00164150.1" = "Paph.7",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00112820.1" = "Paph.8",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00358100.1" = "Paph.9",

# Pap9–10
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00472100.1" = "Paph.10",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00267210.1" = "Paph.11",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00565200.1" = "Paph.12",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00475530.1" = "Paph.13",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00372650.1" = "Paph.14",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00755000.1" = "Paph.15",

# Pap15
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00231330.1" = "Paph.16",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00454460.1" = "Paph.17",

# Pap18–23
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00507050.1" = "Paph.18",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00417950.1" = "Paph.19",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00417910.1" = "Paph.20",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00004770.1" = "Paph.21",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00149170.1" = "Paph.22",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00185580.1" = "Paph.23",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00430080.1" = "Paph.24",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00419620.1" = "Paph.25",

# Pap26–27
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00675360.1" = "Paph.26",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.1HG00078980.1" = "Paph.27",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00448690.1" = "Paph.28",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00448710.1" = "Paph.29",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00620380.1" = "Paph.30",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00361290.1" = "Paph.31",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00400860.1" = "Paph.32",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00376810.1" = "Paph.33",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00269070.1" = "Paph.34",

# Other
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00533910.1" = "Paph.35",
# =========================
  # Catalase
  # =========================
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00681400.1" = "Cat.1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00374170.1" = "Cat.2",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.6HG00495590.1" = "Cat.3",

  # =========================
# Superoxide dismutase
# =========================

# CSDs
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00105600.1" = "Csd.1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00440200.1" = "Csd.2",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.5HG00440830.1" = "Csd.3",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00625840.1" = "Csd.4",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.4HG00360670.1" = "Csd.5",

# FSDs
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00580950.1" = "Csd.6",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.7HG00588580.1" = "Csd.7",

# MSD
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00190130.1" = "Csd.8",

  # =========================
# Polyphenol oxidase
# =========================
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.3HG00268620.1" = "Ppo.1",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00177380.1" = "Ppo.2",
"HORVU.BARKE.PROJ.2HG00177440.1" = "Ppo.3"
)

# ================================================================
# 1) Family → Category mapping (FULL EXPLICIT)
# ================================================================
family_category <- c(
  # ---------------- Starch ----------------
  "Alpha-amylase"              = "Starch degradation",
  "Beta-amylase"               = "Starch degradation",
  "Alpha-glucosidase"          = "Starch degradation",
  "Isoamylase"                 = "Starch degradation",
  "Limit dextrinase"           = "Starch degradation",
  "Alpha glucan phosphorylase" = "Starch degradation",

  # ---------------- Cell wall ----------------
  "Cellulase"           = "Cell wall degradation",
  "Lichenase"           = "Cell wall degradation",
  "Beta-glucosidase"    = "Cell wall degradation",
  "Arabinofuranosidase" = "Cell wall degradation",
  "Mannanase"           = "Cell wall degradation",
  "Alpha-galactosidase" = "Cell wall degradation",
  "Polygalacturonase"   = "Cell wall degradation",
  "Pectin esterase"     = "Cell wall degradation",

  # ---------------- Protein ----------------
  "serine endopeptidase"                = "Protein degradation",
  "papain-like cysteine endopeptidase" = "Protein degradation",
  "aspartic endopeptidase"             = "Protein degradation",
  "Aminopeptidase"                     = "Protein degradation",
  "tripeptidyl peptidase"              = "Protein degradation",
  "dipeptidyl peptidase"               = "Protein degradation",
  "Carboxypeptidase"                   = "Protein degradation",

  # ---------------- Lipid ----------------
  "Lipoxygenase"          = "Lipid degradation",
  "allene oxide synthase" = "Lipid degradation",

  # ---------------- Other ----------------
  "acid phosphatase"     = "Other",
  "Catalase"             = "Other",
  "superoxide dismutase" = "Other",
  "polyphenol oxidase"   = "Other"
)

# ================================================================
# 2) Collect Hv6 proteins
# ================================================================
id_cols <- grep("Protein", names(Hv6_final_matrix), value = TRUE)
if (length(id_cols) == 0) {
  stop("No columns containing protein IDs found in Hv6_final_matrix")
}

malting_rows <- lapply(names(all_families_ID), function(fam) {

  ids <- all_families_ID[[fam]]

  sub <- Hv6_final_matrix %>%
    dplyr::filter(dplyr::if_any(dplyr::all_of(id_cols), ~ . %in% ids))

  if (nrow(sub) > 0) {
    sub$enzyme_family <- fam
    sub$Category <- family_category[[fam]]
    return(sub)
  } else {
    return(NULL)
  }
})

malting_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(malting_rows)

# ================================================================
# FORCE SINGLE BARKE ID PER ROW (handle orthogroups correctly)
# ================================================================

primary_protein_col <- id_cols[1]

# Extract raw values
raw_ids <- malting_all[[primary_protein_col]]

# Split comma-separated orthogroups and keep FIRST ID only
malting_all$primary_barke_id <- vapply(
  strsplit(raw_ids, ","),
  function(x) trimws(x[1]),
  character(1)
)

# Remove empty IDs if any
malting_all <- malting_all[!is.na(malting_all$primary_barke_id) &
                           malting_all$primary_barke_id != "", ]

if (nrow(malting_all) == 0) {
  stop("No matching proteins found for Hv6.")
}

# ================================================================
# 3) Build RAW iBAQ matrix (NO Z-SCORE)
# ================================================================
iBAQ_cols <- grep("^iBAQ_norm_", names(malting_all), value = TRUE)

malting_mat <- as.matrix(malting_all[, iBAQ_cols, drop = FALSE])
mode(malting_mat) <- "numeric"

# Replace non-finite values
malting_mat[!is.finite(malting_mat)] <- NA

# ================================================================
# 4) Rename columns for plotting (FULLY EXPLICIT)
# ================================================================
colnames(malting_mat) <- colnames(malting_mat) %>%
  gsub("^iBAQ_norm_", "", .) %>%
  gsub("hs", " h", .) %>%
  gsub("_", " ", .) %>%
  gsub("barley",  "Barley",  ., ignore.case = TRUE) %>%
  gsub("wheat",   "Wheat",   ., ignore.case = TRUE) %>%
  gsub("rye",     "Rye",     ., ignore.case = TRUE) %>%
  gsub("sorghum", "Sorghum", ., ignore.case = TRUE)

# ================================================================
# 5) Row names using curated barley gene symbols
# ================================================================

# Extract primary protein IDs (first Protein column)
protein_ids <- malting_all$primary_barke_id

# Map to curated barley names
mapped_names <- barke_gene_map[protein_ids]

# Fallback to original ID if missing
mapped_names[is.na(mapped_names)] <- protein_ids[is.na(mapped_names)]

# Ensure uniqueness for pheatmap
rownames(malting_mat) <- make.unique(mapped_names)


# ================================================================
# 6) EXPLICIT FAMILY ORDER (FULL VECTOR, NO SHORTCUTS)
# ================================================================
family_names <- c(
  # ---------------- Starch ----------------
  "Alpha-amylase",
  "Beta-amylase",
  "Alpha-glucosidase",
  "Isoamylase",
  "Limit dextrinase",
  "Alpha glucan phosphorylase",

  # ---------------- Cell wall ----------------
  "Cellulase",
  "Lichenase",
  "Beta-glucosidase",
  "Arabinofuranosidase",
  "Mannanase",
  "Alpha-galactosidase",
  "Polygalacturonase",
  "Pectin esterase",

  # ---------------- Protein ----------------
  "serine endopeptidase",
  "papain-like cysteine endopeptidase",
  "aspartic endopeptidase",
  "Aminopeptidase",
  "tripeptidyl peptidase",
  "dipeptidyl peptidase",
  "Carboxypeptidase",

  # ---------------- Lipid ----------------
  "Lipoxygenase",
  "allene oxide synthase",

  # ---------------- Other ----------------
  "acid phosphatase",
  "Catalase",
  "superoxide dismutase",
  "polyphenol oxidase"
)

category_names <- c(
  "Starch degradation",
  "Cell wall degradation",
  "Lipid degradation",
  "Protein degradation",
  "Other"
)
annotation_row <- data.frame(
  Family   = malting_all$enzyme_family,
  Category = malting_all$Category,
  row.names = rownames(malting_mat)
)



annotation_row$Family   <- factor(annotation_row$Family, levels = family_names)
annotation_row$Category <- factor(annotation_row$Category, levels = category_names)

# ================================================================
# 7) Row ordering
# ================================================================
row_order <- order(annotation_row$Category, annotation_row$Family)

malting_mat   <- malting_mat[row_order, , drop = FALSE]
annotation_row <- annotation_row[row_order, , drop = FALSE]

# ================================================================
# 8) Colors (FULLY EXPLICIT)
# ================================================================
palette <- colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Set3"))(length(family_names))
family_colors <- setNames(palette, family_names)

category_colors <- c(
  "Starch degradation"    = "#E6C229",
  "Cell wall degradation" = "#7FB685",
  "Protein degradation"   = "#E07A5F",
  "Lipid degradation"     = "#8DA0CB",
  "Other"                 = "#BDBDBD"
)

ann_colors <- list(
  Family   = family_colors,
  Category = category_colors
)

heat_colors <- colorRampPalette(c("#FFFFFF", "#FEE8C8", "#D73000"))(150)

# ================================================================
# 9) Output directory
# ================================================================
out_dir <- "../../../R_export/Hv6/malting_enzymes"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) {
  dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

# ================================================================
# 10) Export RAW heatmaps (NO Z-SCORE)
# ================================================================
for (ext in c("jpeg", "svg", "pdf")) {

  outfile <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("Hv6_allFamilies_RAW.", ext))
  cat("Saving:", outfile, "\n")

  if (ext == "jpeg") jpeg(outfile, width = 14, height = 12, units = "in", res = 350)
  if (ext == "svg")  svg(outfile, width = 14, height = 12)
  if (ext == "pdf")  pdf(outfile, width = 14, height = 12)

  pheatmap::pheatmap(
    malting_mat,
    scale = "none",
    color = heat_colors,
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    annotation_row = annotation_row,
    annotation_colors = ann_colors,
    show_rownames = TRUE,
    show_colnames = TRUE,
    legend = TRUE,
    annotation_legend = TRUE,
    fontsize_row = 5,
    fontsize_col = 7,
    main = "Hv6: Expression of enzyme families (raw normalized iBAQ)"
  )

  dev.off()
}

cat("✔ Hv6 RAW heatmaps saved in:", out_dir, "\n")

## ============================================================
## Hv6 — Species-specific malting enzyme heatmaps (HOG-anchored)
## ============================================================

library(dplyr)
library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load protein-resolved matrix
# ------------------------------------------------------------
Hv6 <- read.csv(
  "../../../R_Data/Hv6/Hv6_final_matrix_no_mean.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

Hv6 <- Hv6 %>% filter(!grepl("^UNASSIGNED_", HOG))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Rename iBAQ channels → timepoints
# ------------------------------------------------------------
timepoints <- c("0hs","12hs","24hs","36hs",
                "48hs","60hs","72hs","84hs","96hs")

rename_ibaq <- function(df, species){
  old <- grep(paste0("^iBAQ_norm_ch[0-9]+_", species), names(df), value = TRUE)
  new <- paste0("iBAQ_norm_", timepoints, "_", species)
  names(df)[match(old, names(df))] <- new
  df
}

for (sp in c("barley","wheat","rye","sorghum")) {
  Hv6 <- rename_ibaq(Hv6, sp)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Identify malting HOGs FROM BARLEY ONLY
# ------------------------------------------------------------
barley_df <- Hv6 %>% filter(Species == "barley")

malting_barley <- lapply(names(all_families_ID), function(fam){

  ids <- all_families_ID[[fam]]
  sub <- barley_df %>% filter(Protein_ID %in% ids)

  if (nrow(sub) > 0) {
    sub$enzyme_family <- fam
    sub$Category <- family_category[[fam]]
    sub
  }
})

malting_barley <- bind_rows(malting_barley)

if (nrow(malting_barley) == 0)
  stop("No barley malting proteins detected.")

# Core anchor
malting_HOGs <- unique(malting_barley$HOG)

cat("Malting HOGs identified:", length(malting_HOGs), "\n")

# Map HOG → family/category
hog_annotation <- malting_barley %>%
  select(HOG, enzyme_family, Category) %>%
  distinct()

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Function to build species heatmaps
# ------------------------------------------------------------
make_species_heatmap <- function(species_name){

  cat("Processing:", species_name, "\n")

  df <- Hv6 %>% filter(Species == species_name)

  # Keep ONLY malting HOGs
  malting <- df %>% filter(HOG %in% malting_HOGs)

  if (nrow(malting) == 0) {
    cat("⚠ No proteins for", species_name, "\n")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Attach family annotation
  malting <- malting %>%
    left_join(hog_annotation, by = "HOG")

      # ----------------------------------------
  # Build intensity matrix (RENAMED columns)
  # ----------------------------------------

  iBAQ_cols <- grep(
    paste0("^iBAQ_norm_.*_", species_name, "$"),
    names(malting),
    value = TRUE
  )

  # Keep only true timepoint columns (exclude GO / annotation garbage)
  iBAQ_cols <- iBAQ_cols[!grepl("GO|entry|TAIR|pname|gname", iBAQ_cols)]

  # Sort by timepoint order
  tp_order <- c("0hs","12hs","24hs","36hs","48hs","60hs","72hs","84hs","96hs")
  iBAQ_cols <- iBAQ_cols[order(match(sub(".*norm_", "", sub(paste0("_", species_name), "", iBAQ_cols)), tp_order))]

  if (length(iBAQ_cols) != 9) {
    stop(paste0(
      "Expected 9 iBAQ columns for ", species_name,
      " but found ", length(iBAQ_cols), ":\n",
      paste(iBAQ_cols, collapse = "\n")
    ))
  }

  mat <- as.matrix(malting[, iBAQ_cols, drop = FALSE])
  mode(mat) <- "numeric"
  mat[!is.finite(mat)] <- NA




  # ----------------------------------------
  # Clean column names
  # ----------------------------------------
  colnames(mat) <- gsub("^iBAQ_norm_", "", colnames(mat))
  colnames(mat) <- gsub("_", " ", colnames(mat))
  colnames(mat) <- gsub("hs", " h", colnames(mat))

  # ----------------------------------------
  # Row names per species
  # ----------------------------------------
  if (species_name == "barley") {

    ids <- malting$Protein_ID
    gene_names <- barke_gene_map[ids]
    gene_names[is.na(gene_names)] <- ids[is.na(gene_names)]

    rownames(mat) <- make.unique(paste0(malting$HOG, " - ", gene_names))

  } else if (species_name == "wheat") {

    rownames(mat) <- make.unique(
      paste0(malting$HOG, " - ", malting$wheatup_entry)
    )

  } else if (species_name == "sorghum") {

    rownames(mat) <- make.unique(
      paste0(malting$HOG, " - ", malting$sorghumup_entry)
    )

  } else if (species_name == "rye") {

    rownames(mat) <- make.unique(malting$HOG)
  }

  # ----------------------------------------
  # Row annotation
  # ----------------------------------------
  annotation_row <- data.frame(
    Family   = malting$enzyme_family,
    Category = malting$Category,
    row.names = rownames(mat)
  )

  family_names <- names(family_category)
  category_names <- unique(family_category)

  annotation_row$Family   <- factor(annotation_row$Family, levels = family_names)
  annotation_row$Category <- factor(annotation_row$Category, levels = category_names)

  ord <- order(annotation_row$Category, annotation_row$Family)
  mat <- mat[ord, , drop = FALSE]
  annotation_row <- annotation_row[ord, , drop = FALSE]

  # ----------------------------------------
  # Colors
  # ----------------------------------------
  palette <- colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(12, "Set3"))(length(family_names))
  family_colors <- setNames(palette, family_names)

  category_colors <- c(
    "Starch degradation"    = "#E6C229",
    "Cell wall degradation" = "#7FB685",
    "Protein degradation"   = "#E07A5F",
    "Lipid degradation"     = "#8DA0CB",
    "Other"                 = "#BDBDBD"
  )

  ann_colors <- list(Family = family_colors, Category = category_colors)
  heat_colors <- colorRampPalette(c("#FFFFFF","#FEE8C8","#D73000"))(150)

  # ----------------------------------------
  # Save heatmaps
  # ----------------------------------------
  out_dir <- "../../../R_export/Hv6/malting_enzymes_species"
  if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

  for (ext in c("jpeg","svg","pdf")) {

    outfile <- file.path(out_dir,
                         paste0("Hv6_", species_name, "_RAW_noMean.", ext))

    if (ext == "jpeg") jpeg(outfile, 14, 12, units="in", res=350)
    if (ext == "svg")  svg(outfile, 14, 12)
    if (ext == "pdf")  pdf(outfile, 14, 12)

    pheatmap(
      mat,
      scale = "none",
      color = heat_colors,
      cluster_rows = FALSE,
      cluster_cols = FALSE,
      annotation_row = annotation_row,
      annotation_colors = ann_colors,
      fontsize_row = 5,
      fontsize_col = 7,
      main = paste("Hv6:", species_name, "malting enzymes (HOG anchored)")
    )

    dev.off()
  }

  cat("✔ Done:", species_name, "\n")
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Generate all species
# ------------------------------------------------------------
for (sp in c("barley","wheat","rye","sorghum")) {
  make_species_heatmap(sp)
}

cat("✔ All species heatmaps generated\n")


```


#Unbiased analysis 
We want to identify that part of the proteome that is either much more abundant or uniquely expressed in each species 


```{r}

# --- Load + rename channels to timepoints ---
Hv6_final_matrix <- read.csv("../../../R_Data/Hv6/Hv6_final_matrix.csv",
                             header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

timepoints <- c("0hs","0hs.1","12hs","24hs","36hs",
                "48hs","60hs","72hs","84hs","96hs","96hs.1")

rename_ibaq <- function(df, species){
  old <- grep(paste0("^iBAQ_norm_ch[0-9]+_", species), names(df), value = TRUE)
  tp_use <- timepoints[seq_len(min(length(old), length(timepoints)))]
  new <- paste0("iBAQ_norm_", tp_use, "_", species)
  names(df)[match(old, names(df))] <- new
  df
}
for (sp in c("barley","wheat","rye","sorghum")) {
  Hv6_final_matrix <- rename_ibaq(Hv6_final_matrix, sp)
}

# --- Parameters ---
fc_threshold <- 10
fc_threshold_hv <- 10
min_tp       <- 11
min_tp_hv       <- 11
fc_threshold_w <- 10
min_tp_w       <- 9
fc_threshold_r <- 10
min_tp_r      <- 9

# --- Long format ---
ibaq_long <- Hv6_final_matrix %>%
  dplyr::select(HOG, starts_with("iBAQ_norm_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(-HOG, names_to = "sample", values_to = "iBAQ") %>%
  separate(sample, into = c("prefix","norm","timepoint","species"),
           sep = "_", extra = "merge") %>%
  mutate(
    iBAQ = as.numeric(iBAQ),
    iBAQ = ifelse(is.na(iBAQ) | iBAQ <= 0, 1, iBAQ),
    timepoint = factor(timepoint, levels = timepoints)
  )

# --- Average per HOG × species × timepoint ---
species_avg <- ibaq_long %>%
  group_by(HOG, species, timepoint) %>%
  summarise(iBAQ = mean(iBAQ, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# --- Compare species at each timepoint ---
comparison_df <- species_avg %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = species, values_from = iBAQ)

for (sp in c("barley","wheat","rye","sorghum")) {
  if (!sp %in% names(comparison_df)) comparison_df[[sp]] <- 1
}

comparison_df <- comparison_df %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    barley_bias  = (barley  >= fc_threshold_hv * max(c(wheat, rye, sorghum))),
    wheat_bias   = (wheat   >= fc_threshold_w * max(c(barley, rye, sorghum))),
    rye_bias     = (rye     >= fc_threshold_r * max(c(barley, wheat, sorghum))),
    sorghum_bias = (sorghum >= fc_threshold * max(c(barley, wheat, rye)))
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# --- Count biased timepoints per HOG ---
species_bias_counts <- comparison_df %>%
  group_by(HOG) %>%
  summarise(
    barley_count  = sum(barley_bias,  na.rm = TRUE),
    wheat_count   = sum(wheat_bias,   na.rm = TRUE),
    rye_count     = sum(rye_bias,     na.rm = TRUE),
    sorghum_count = sum(sorghum_bias, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# --- Lists of biased OGs ---
species_biased_lists <- list(
  barley  = species_bias_counts %>% filter(barley_count  >= min_tp_hv) %>% pull(HOG),
  wheat   = species_bias_counts %>% filter(wheat_count   >= min_tp_w) %>% pull(HOG),
  rye     = species_bias_counts %>% filter(rye_count     >= min_tp_r) %>% pull(HOG),
  sorghum = species_bias_counts %>% filter(sorghum_count >= min_tp) %>% pull(HOG)
)
biased_union <- unique(unlist(species_biased_lists))

# --- Define the universe (all TAIR IDs across 4 columns) ---
universe <- Hv6_final_matrix %>%
  dplyr::select(TAIR_hv, TAIR_wheat, TAIR_rye, TAIR_sorghum) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), values_to = "TAIR") %>%
  filter(!is.na(TAIR)) %>%
  mutate(TAIR = sub(";.*$", "", TAIR)) %>%
  pull(TAIR) %>%
  unique()

# --- Helper to extract TAIR IDs ---
extract_tair <- function(og_list, df) {
  df %>%
    filter(HOG %in% og_list) %>%
    dplyr::select(TAIR_hv, TAIR_wheat, TAIR_rye, TAIR_sorghum) %>%
    unlist() %>%
    na.omit() %>%
    sub(";.*$", "", .) %>%
    unique()
}
barley_tair  <- extract_tair(species_biased_lists$barley,  Hv6_final_matrix)
wheat_tair   <- extract_tair(species_biased_lists$wheat,   Hv6_final_matrix)
rye_tair     <- extract_tair(species_biased_lists$rye,     Hv6_final_matrix)
sorghum_tair <- extract_tair(species_biased_lists$sorghum, Hv6_final_matrix)

# --- Run enrichment analysis ---
enrich_barley  <- enrichGO(gene = barley_tair,  OrgDb = org.At.tair.db, keyType = "TAIR", ont = "ALL", universe = universe)
enrich_barley_2 <- enrich_barley@result %>%
  separate_rows(geneID, sep = "/")
enrich_barley_anno <- merge(
  enrich_barley_2,
  Hv6_final_matrix,
  by.x = "geneID",
  by.y = "TAIR_hv",
  all.x = TRUE
)
enrich_wheat   <- enrichGO(gene = wheat_tair,   OrgDb = org.At.tair.db, keyType = "TAIR", ont = "ALL", universe = universe)
enrich_wheat_2 <- enrich_wheat@result %>%
  separate_rows(geneID, sep = "/")
enrich_wheat_anno <- merge(
  enrich_wheat_2,
  Hv6_final_matrix,
  by.x = "geneID",
  by.y = "TAIR_hv",
  all.x = TRUE
)
enrich_rye     <- enrichGO(gene = rye_tair,     OrgDb = org.At.tair.db, keyType = "TAIR", ont = "ALL", universe = universe)
enrich_rye_2 <- enrich_rye@result %>%
  separate_rows(geneID, sep = "/")
enrich_rye_anno <- merge(
  enrich_rye_2,
  Hv6_final_matrix,
  by.x = "geneID",
  by.y = "TAIR_hv",
  all.x = TRUE
)
enrich_sorghum <- enrichGO(gene = sorghum_tair, OrgDb = org.At.tair.db, keyType = "TAIR", ont = "ALL", universe = universe)
enrich_sorghum_2 <- enrich_sorghum@result %>%
  separate_rows(geneID, sep = "/")
enrich_sorghum_anno <- merge(
  enrich_sorghum_2,
  Hv6_final_matrix,
  by.x = "geneID",
  by.y = "TAIR_hv",
  all.x = TRUE
)

#Generate a unique image with enrichments 
enrich_barley_anno_sel <- enrich_barley@result[c(2,3,4,5), ]
enrich_wheat_anno_sel <- enrich_wheat@result[c(2,3,4), ]
enrich_rye_anno_sel <- enrich_rye@result[c(1,3,4), ]
enrich_sorghum_anno_sel <- enrich_sorghum@result[c(10,17,24,26), ]

# Create a named list of enrichment results
enrich_list <- list(
  "Barley" = enrich_barley_anno_sel,
  "Wheat" = enrich_wheat_anno_sel,
  "Rye" = enrich_rye_anno_sel,
  "Sorghum" = enrich_sorghum_anno_sel
)

# Merge enrichment results into a compareClusterResult object
merged <- merge_result(enrich_list)

# Visualize results
p <- dotplot(merged, showCategory = 18)

# Print the plot (optional in some IDEs)
print(p)

# Save the dotplot
ggsave("../../../R_export/Hv6/unbiased_species_biased/dotplot_biased.png",
       plot = p, width = 9, height = 10, dpi = 300, scale=0.8)

# Save the plot
dev.copy(png, file = "../../../R_export/Hv4/unbiased/enrich_GO/dotplot_ance.png", width = 1500, height = 1500, res = 200)
dev.off()
dotplot(enrich_barley, showCategory = 15)
dotplot(enrich_wheat, showCategory = 15)
dotplot(enrich_rye, showCategory = 15)
dotplot(enrich_sorghum, showCategory = 15)


# --- Heatmap of all biased HOGs ---
species <- c("barley","wheat","rye","sorghum")
col_order <- unlist(lapply(species, function(sp) paste0("iBAQ_norm_", timepoints, "_", sp)))
col_order <- col_order[col_order %in% names(Hv6_final_matrix)]

hm_df <- Hv6_final_matrix[Hv6_final_matrix$HOG %in% biased_union,
                          c("HOG", col_order), drop = FALSE]
hm_mat <- as.matrix(hm_df[, col_order, drop = FALSE])
rownames(hm_mat) <- hm_df$HOG
hm_mat[is.na(hm_mat)] <- 1

outdir <- "../../../R_export/Hv6/unbiased_species_biased"
if (!dir.exists(outdir)) dir.create(outdir, recursive = TRUE)

jpeg(file.path(outdir, "species_specific_proteomes.jpeg"),
     width = 14, height = 10, units = "in", res = 350)

pheatmap(
  hm_mat,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = FALSE,
  scale = "row",
  show_rownames = FALSE,
  show_colnames = TRUE,
  annotation_row = NULL,
  annotation_col = NULL,
  annotation_legend = FALSE,
  legend = TRUE,
  fontsize_col = 8,
  color = colorRampPalette(c("blue2","white","firebrick3"))(50),
  main = "Species-Biased Proteomes (z-score iBAQ)"
)

dev.off()



```

#Check beta-amy processing

```{r}
############################################################
## HOG peptide extraction & heatmap generation (PDF version)
############################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
    library(data.table)
    library(pheatmap)
})

## ============================================================
## 0) USER INPUTS
## ============================================================

ortho_file <- "../../../R_Data/Hv6/Hv6_final_matrix.csv"
pept_dir   <- "../../../R_import/Hv6/peptides"

out_base   <- "../../../R_export/Hv6/HOG0005408_peptides"
dir.create(out_base, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

target_hog <- "N0.HOG0005408"

# Thresholds
min_val  <- 0.1
smooth_k <- 3
thr_list <- list(
    barley  = 4,
    wheat   = 4,
    rye     = 4,
    sorghum = 4
)

# Species definitions
species_info <- data.table(
    Species  = c("barley",          "wheat",           "rye",              "sorghum"),
    File     = c("peptides_Hv.txt", "peptides_Ta.txt", "peptides_Sc.txt",  "peptides_Sb.txt"),
    BatchTag = c("Hv6_b1",          "Hv6_b2",          "Hv6_b3_rye",       "Hv6_b4_2"),
    ProtCol  = c("Proteins_barley", "Proteins_wheat",  "Proteins_rye",     "Proteins_sorghum")
)

# Create species folders
for (sp in species_info$Species) {
    dir.create(file.path(out_base, sp), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
}

## ============================================================
## Helper functions
## ============================================================

edge_ma <- function(x, k = 3){
    if (all(is.na(x))) return(x)
    h <- floor(k / 2)
    x_ext <- c(rep(x[1], h), x, rep(x[length(x)], h))
    y <- stats::filter(x_ext, rep(1/k, k), sides = 2)
    as.numeric(y[(h+1):(length(y)-h)])
}

smooth_matrix <- function(mat, k = 3) {
    t(apply(mat, 1, edge_ma, k = k))
}

get_intensity_cols <- function(dt, batch_tag) {
    patt <- paste0("^Reporter intensity corrected [0-9]+ ", batch_tag, "$")
    grep(patt, names(dt), value = TRUE)
}

protein_in_proteins_column <- function(prot_id, proteins_vec) {
    sapply(
        proteins_vec,
        function(x) {
            ids <- trimws(unlist(strsplit(x, ",")))
            prot_id %in% ids
        }
    )
}

sanitize_prot_id <- function(prot_id) {
    gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9._-]", "_", prot_id)
}

## ============================================================
## 1) Preprocess peptides (impute, correct outliers)
## ============================================================

pep_list      <- list()
mask_list     <- list()
int_cols_list <- list()

for (i in seq_len(nrow(species_info))) {
    
    sp        <- species_info$Species[i]
    pep_file  <- file.path(pept_dir, species_info$File[i])
    batch_tag <- species_info$BatchTag[i]
    
    message("\n-----------------------------------------------------")
    message("📌 Species: ", sp)
    
    if (!file.exists(pep_file)) {
        message("⚠ Missing file, skipping...")
        next
    }
    
    dt <- fread(pep_file, sep = "\t", quote = "", header = TRUE)
    dt_sp <- copy(dt)
    
    int_cols <- get_intensity_cols(dt_sp, batch_tag)
    int_cols <- int_cols[1:9]
    dt_sp[, (int_cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = int_cols]
    
    mat <- as.matrix(dt_sp[, ..int_cols])
    mode(mat) <- "numeric"
    
    thr <- thr_list[[sp]]
    mask <- matrix(FALSE, nrow(mat), ncol(mat))
    
    for (r in seq_len(nrow(mat))) {
        row_vals <- mat[r, ]
        for (j in seq_along(row_vals)) {
            val <- row_vals[j]
            neigh_idx <- intersect(c(j-1, j+1), seq_along(row_vals))
            neigh_vals <- row_vals[neigh_idx]
            neigh_vals <- neigh_vals[is.finite(neigh_vals) & neigh_vals > 0]
            if (!length(neigh_vals)) next
            neigh_mean <- mean(neigh_vals)
            if (is.na(val) || val < min_val) {
                row_vals[j] <- neigh_mean
                mask[r,j] <- TRUE
            } else {
                log2fc <- log2((val+1)/(neigh_mean+1))
                if (abs(log2fc) > thr) {
                    row_vals[j] <- neigh_mean
                    mask[r,j] <- TRUE
                }
            }
        }
        mat[r,] <- row_vals
    }
    
    for (j in seq_along(int_cols)) dt_sp[[int_cols[j]]] <- mat[, j]
    pep_list[[sp]]      <- dt_sp
    mask_list[[sp]]     <- mask
    int_cols_list[[sp]] <- int_cols
}

species_done <- names(pep_list)

## ============================================================
## 2) Intra-species TSN
## ============================================================

for (sp in species_done) {
    dt   <- pep_list[[sp]]
    mask <- mask_list[[sp]]
    int_cols <- int_cols_list[[sp]]
    
    mat <- as.matrix(dt[, ..int_cols])
    col_sums <- sapply(seq_along(int_cols), function(j) {
        sum(mat[!mask[,j], j], na.rm = TRUE)
    })
    
    target <- median(col_sums[col_sums > 0])
    factors <- target / col_sums
    
    for (j in seq_along(int_cols)) {
        idx <- !mask[, j] & is.finite(mat[, j])
        mat[idx, j] <- mat[idx, j] * factors[j]
    }
    
    for (j in seq_along(int_cols)) dt[[int_cols[j]]] <- mat[, j]
    pep_list[[sp]] <- dt
}

## ============================================================
## 3) Inter-species median centering
## ============================================================

species_meds <- sapply(species_done, function(sp) {
    dt <- pep_list[[sp]]
    mask <- mask_list[[sp]]
    int_cols <- int_cols_list[[sp]]
    vals <- unlist(lapply(seq_along(int_cols), function(j) dt[[int_cols[j]]][!mask[,j]]))
    median(vals)
})

grand_median <- median(species_meds)

for (sp in species_done) {
    dt   <- pep_list[[sp]]
    mask <- mask_list[[sp]]
    int_cols <- int_cols_list[[sp]]
    factor <- grand_median / species_meds[sp]
    for (j in seq_along(int_cols)) {
        idx <- !mask[, j] & is.finite(dt[[int_cols[j]]])
        dt[[int_cols[j]]][idx] <- dt[[int_cols[j]]][idx] * factor
    }
    pep_list[[sp]] <- dt
}

## ============================================================
## 4) Smoothing + log2
## ============================================================

for (sp in species_done) {
    dt <- pep_list[[sp]]
    int_cols <- int_cols_list[[sp]]
    mat <- as.matrix(dt[, ..int_cols])
    mat <- log2(smooth_matrix(mat, k = smooth_k) + 1)
    for (j in seq_along(int_cols)) dt[[int_cols[j]]] <- mat[, j]
    pep_list[[sp]] <- dt
}

## ============================================================
## 5) Load HOG table
## ============================================================

ortho <- fread(ortho_file)
row_target <- ortho[HOG == target_hog]

## ============================================================
## 6) Extract peptides per protein, write tsv + PDF heatmap
## ============================================================

for (i in seq_len(nrow(species_info))) {
    
    sp       <- species_info$Species[i]
    prot_col <- species_info$ProtCol[i]
    
    if (!(sp %in% species_done)) next
    
    prot_string <- as.character(row_target[[prot_col]])
    if (is.na(prot_string) || prot_string == "") next
    prot_vec <- trimws(unlist(strsplit(prot_string, ",")))
    prot_vec <- prot_vec[nzchar(prot_vec)]
    
    dt_sp    <- pep_list[[sp]]
    int_cols <- int_cols_list[[sp]]
    
    for (prot_id in prot_vec) {
        
        idx <- protein_in_proteins_column(prot_id, dt_sp$Proteins)
        dt_prot <- dt_sp[idx]
        if (nrow(dt_prot) == 0) next
        
        mat <- as.matrix(dt_prot[, ..int_cols])
        rownames(mat) <- make.unique(dt_prot$Sequence)
        colnames(mat) <- paste0("Ch", seq_len(ncol(mat)))
        
        out_dir <- file.path(out_base, sp, sanitize_prot_id(prot_id))
        dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
        
        fwrite(
            cbind(dt_prot[, .(Sequence, Proteins)], as.data.table(mat)),
            file.path(out_dir, "peptides_normalized.tsv"),
            sep = "\t"
        )
        
        # ---- PDF HEATMAP ----
        row_sd <- apply(mat, 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
        mat_hm <- mat[row_sd > 0, , drop = FALSE]
        
        if (nrow(mat_hm) >= 2) {
            pdf(file.path(out_dir, "heatmap.pdf"), width = 12, height = 9)
            pheatmap(
                mat_hm,
                scale="row",
                cluster_rows=TRUE,
                cluster_cols=FALSE,
                main=paste("Peptide map –", sp, prot_id, "\nHOG:", target_hog),
                show_rownames=TRUE,
                fontsize=8
            )
            dev.off()
        }
    }
}

message("\n🎯 DONE (PDF version)!")

```
